case_title: JOHN H. LEAMY VS. SHMULIK KRAMPF

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEBRUARY 17, 2017 AT 3:30. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SHMULIK KRAMPF, 500 POST STREET, S.F. CA 94102
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, ACCOUNT HOLDER SHMULIK KRAMPF.
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2017 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JAN-11-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS $500 CASH TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN OPEN COURT. THE BALANCE ($4352.50 LESS $500) IS $3,852.50 TO BE PAID IN 12 EQUAL INSTALLMENTS OF $321.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING MID-MONTH OCTOBER 2017. ATTENDANCE AT PROGRESS REPORT IN JANUARY 2018. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT RECORDED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 09/14/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBPOENA FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEAMY, JOHN H. SERVED NOV-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEAMY, JOHN H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-17-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN H. LEAMY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SHMULIK KRAMPF. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEAMY, JOHN H.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. MAIL TO THE DEBTOR WAS RETURNED TO COURT. NO PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEBTOR BY REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER OR SHERIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED NOV-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMPF, SHMULIK HEARING SET FOR SEP-14-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
